3210800.name: Crow Boss
3210800.description:
Character

In a world where war reigns, a raven known by the nickname Boss leads countless conquests in the name of the King. As the captain of the royal guard and most loyal warrior, Boss never shows hesitation in his cruel acts, until a spark of feelings takes over him on one of his missions, bringing upon himself the wrath of the King, who soon ordered his death at the hands of his own servants. With such betrayal, the world of the dead could not contain him and Boss returns from the confines of Limbo seeking revenge and perhaps redemption.

  • Souls-like action RPG.

  • Vast arsenal of weapons, items and equipment.

  • Countless possibilities for creating builds.

  • A retro design for lovers of the genre.

World

Skylonor, a vast medieval land inhabited by birds, who long ago lost the right to fly in the sky, with a few exceptions. In this land, war and the thirst for power reign over the weak and unprepared. In search of the feathers and riches that this world offers, many kingdoms fight among themselves. Caladornis, ruled by Cedrik, the warlord, has become the dominant one among all the others, thanks to its royal guard, the three beasts commanded by Boss, the most skilled warrior ever seen. Caladornis continues to grow and swallow kingdoms, villages and anything considered valuable, until someone strong enough can stand against such a force.
3210800.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
